message:
fix(web): proper JSON escaping in error bodies and structured error formatting

Two fixes to the error response pipeline:

1. JSON injection fix: format_error_body() previously used manual
   backslash/quote escaping for error messages in JSON responses.
   Now uses serde_json::to_string() which handles all edge cases
   (unicode escapes, control characters, nested quotes) correctly.

2. Structured error formatting: new helpers extract error formatting
   into composable pieces:
   - default_error_message(): maps StatusCode to human-readable defaults
   - error_message_from_response(): extracts message from response body
     when expose_details is true, falls back to default
   - format_error_response(): top-level helper that content-negotiates
     the error format based on Accept header

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
